name: codex-review
description: Professional code review with auto CHANGELOG generation, integrated with Codex AI
capabilities: Analyzes code changes and provides professional review feedback
Generates CHANGELOG entries automatically from code modifications
Integrates with Codex AI for intelligent code understanding
author: sickn33
securitySummary: All static analysis findings were false positives. The SKILL.md file is documentation-only markdown with no executable code. Referenced external commands (npx) and URLs are installation instructions and documentation links, not actual code execution or network calls. No cryptographic operations exist.
valueStatement: Manual code reviews are time-consuming and changelogs are often neglected. This skill automates both using Codex AI, ensuring consistent quality and up-to-date documentation.
userTitle: Automate Code Reviews and Changelogs with Codex
limitations: Requires Codex CLI to be installed and configured
Needs CHANGELOG.md file in project root for updates
Review quality depends on code context availability
Cannot execute or test the reviewed code

useCases.title: Pre-commit Code Review
useCases.description: Get automated feedback on code changes before committing to catch issues early

useCases.title: Automated Changelog Maintenance
useCases.description: Keep CHANGELOG.md updated automatically as code evolves without manual effort

useCases.title: Large Refactoring Analysis
useCases.description: Review extensive code changes systematically to ensure nothing is overlooked

promptTemplates.title: Basic Code Review
promptTemplates.prompt: Review my recent code changes and provide feedback on code quality, potential bugs, and improvements

promptTemplates.title: Changelog Generation
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze the modified files and generate appropriate CHANGELOG.md entries following conventional changelog format
promptTemplates.scenario: After completing a feature or fix

promptTemplates.title: Security-Focused Review
promptTemplates.prompt: Review this code with focus on security vulnerabilities, input validation, and potential attack vectors
promptTemplates.scenario: Handling sensitive data or user input

promptTemplates.title: Refactoring Analysis
promptTemplates.prompt: Review this large-scale refactoring and verify that functionality is preserved while code quality improves

bestPractices: Keep CHANGELOG.md in your project root before using this skill
Use conventional commit messages for accurate changelog generation
Run reviews on feature branches before merging to main
antiPatterns: Do not skip review for small changes - bugs often hide in simple code
Avoid committing without reviewing security-sensitive changes
Do not rely solely on automated review for critical system changes

faq.question: What is required to use this skill?
faq.answer: You need Codex CLI installed and configured, and a CHANGELOG.md file in your project root.

faq.question: Can this skill execute my code?
faq.answer: No, this skill only analyzes and reviews code. It does not execute or test the code.

faq.question: What commit format works best?
faq.answer: Conventional commits (feat:, fix:, chore:, etc.) provide the best results for changelog generation.

faq.question: Does this work with private repositories?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill operates locally on your code and does not send code to external services.

faq.question: How detailed are the code reviews?
faq.answer: Reviews cover code quality, potential bugs, style consistency, and improvement suggestions based on best practices.

faq.question: Can I customize the changelog format?
faq.answer: The skill follows conventional changelog format by default. Refer to the repository for customization options.
